title: Hazard in the Cavern
hook: Scavenger work has stirred up a cavern hazard tied to red mist mold and escalating environmental risk.
playerSummary: A dangerous cavern and its strange fungal contamination may become important if the party follows the scavenger lead.
gmTruth: Keep this grounded as a hazard and ecosystem-pressure thread at first. The health-shot detail is an early warning sign, not the full reveal.
